title: MITRE ATLAS (AI security) entry
description: One MITRE ATLAS technique/sub-technique or real-world AI-incident case study, generated deterministically from the official ATLAS YAML by kbs/_tools/gen_atlas.py. ATLAS is the ATT&CK-style framework for attacks on AI/ML systems. Guardian searches it (knowledge_search) to ground investigations of AI-targeting incidents (prompt injection, model evasion, data poisoning, agent hijacking).

id.description: ATLAS id: technique 'AML.T0051', sub-technique 'AML.T0000.000', or case study 'AML.CS0000'.

attack_enterprise_ref.description: Mapped ATT&CK Enterprise technique id, when ATLAS declares one.
